_metadata.dbw_filter: router_type=heuristic for Tables 2/3/5, all variants for Table 4

metrics.name: CSAS (Cross-Source Attribution Score)
metrics.formula: F1(precision, recall) of source-type citations vs expected sources
metrics.description: Measures whether the answer cites the correct type of source

metrics.name: MSUR (Multi-Source Utilization Rate)
metrics.formula: avg fraction of {doc, bug, work_item} present in top-k per query
metrics.description: Higher = more source diversity in retrieved chunks

judge_setup.prompt_type: Depth-based RCI with 4 few-shot examples per dimension
